name: Electronics
description: All electronic devices and gadgets including computers, smartphones, tablets, and accessories. This is a parent category for all tech-related products.

name: Smartphones
description: Mobile phones and smartphones from various brands including Apple, Samsung, Google, and other manufacturers. Includes latest models and budget options.

name: Clothing & Apparel
description: Fashion clothing items including men's wear, women's wear, and children's clothing. Covers casual, formal, and sportswear collections.

name: Home & Garden
description: Home furnishings, furniture, décor items, and garden supplies. Everything needed for home improvement and outdoor gardening projects.

name: Laptops & Computers
description: Desktop computers, laptops, and computing devices. Includes various brands like Dell, HP, Lenovo, Apple, and gaming-focused models.
